name: kafka_list_topics
description: List all topics in the Kafka cluster with their partition counts and replication factors.

name: kafka_describe_topic
description: Get detailed information about a Kafka topic including partitions, replicas, ISR, and configuration.

topic.description: The name of the topic to describe

name: kafka_list_consumer_groups
description: List all consumer groups in the Kafka cluster with their state and member count.

name: kafka_consumer_group_lag
description: Check the consumer lag for a specific consumer group across all its subscribed topic partitions.

group_id.description: The consumer group ID to check lag for

name: kafka_broker_health
description: Check the health and status of all brokers in the Kafka cluster including controller info and node states.

name: search_knowledge_base
description: Search the operations knowledge base for architecture documentation, troubleshooting runbooks, and operational procedures. Use this when you need context about how the system is designed, what the expected configuration is, or how to diagnose and resolve issues.

query.description: The search query describing what information you need from the knowledge base
